cards.back: A method of transmitting data in which packets of data are transmitted independently over a network, where each packet is routed to its destination based on its destination IP address
A type of packet switching in which packets are stored in a buffer before being forwarded to their destination
A type of packet switching in which packets are transmitted in a centralized network, where all devices connect to a central node (hub)
A type of packet switching in which a dedicated path is established between the sender and receiver for the duration of the communication
A type of packet in packet switching in which the destination address is not included, and the sender has no guarantee of delivery
